attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 PRODUCT_KEY,
 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 AR_TRX_KEY,
 SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
 DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
 DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
 DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
 DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,  
 SERVICE_FLG,
 RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ORDER BY BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ASC )  RK,
 SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
 DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
 DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT, 
 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,
 NXAAS.LINE_CREATION_DATE,
 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
 CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
 INNER JOIN (SEL SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,CAST(TRX_LINE_CREATION_DTM AS DATE FORMAT'yyyy-mm-dd') AS LINE_CREATION_DATE FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX GROUP BY 1,2) NXAAS                     
 ON NBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NXAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='XAAS' 
 AND DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY > 0
 AND EDW_CREATE_DATETIME> '$$LastExtractDate'


 union all

 SELECT 
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 PRODUCT_KEY,
 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 AR_TRX_KEY,
 SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
 DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
 DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
 DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
 DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,  
 SERVICE_FLG,
 RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ORDER BY BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ASC )  RK,
 SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,
 DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
 DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT, 
 SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,
 NXAAS.LINE_CREATION_DATE,
 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
 CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(50)) RTNR_UNIQUE_ID
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
 INNER JOIN (SEL SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,CAST(TRX_LINE_CREATION_DTM AS DATE FORMAT'yyyy-mm-dd') AS LINE_CREATION_DATE ,BOOKED_DT                     
FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX 
 where ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD  like '%CBM%') NXAAS 
   ON NBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NXAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='ERP' 
 AND DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY > 0
 AND EDW_CREATE_DATETIME> '$$LastExtractDate'
   AND NXAAS.BOOKED_DT>=
 (SELECT cast(LAST_EXTRACT_DATE as date)
 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES 
 WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='OVERLAY_CBM_FILTER_DATE'
 )
